message: docs: fix install easy-mode snippet order

files.patch: @@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ ```bash # One command to catch 1000+ bug patterns (always master, cache-busted) curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultimate_bug_scanner/master/install.sh?$(date +%s)" \ - | bash -s -- --easy-mode + | bash -s -- ```
